mapper.sql: id, task_id, task_title, start_time, end_time, duration, is_completed, type, created_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pomodoro_record (task_id, task_title, start_time, end_time, duration, is_completed, type, created_time) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{taskTitle}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{isCompleted}, #{type}, #{createdTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE pomodoro_record SET task_id = #{taskId}, task_title = #{taskTitle}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration = #{duration}, is_completed = #{isCompleted}, type = #{type} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pomodoro_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT FROM pomodoro_record WHERE DATE(start_time) = #{date} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT FROM pomodoro_record WHERE DATE(start_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(start_time) <= #{endDate} ORDER BY start_time
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pomodoro_record WHERE DATE(start_time) = #{date} AND is_completed = 1 AND type = 'work'
